question:
Will Microstrategy announce a Bitcoin purchase November 25-December 1?

Description: This market will resolve to "Yes" if MicroStrategy Incorporated announces that they have acquired additional Bitcoin between the dates in the title (from 12:00 AM ET on the first date to 11:59 PM ET on the last date). Otherwise, it will resolve to "No".

This market will resolve based on announcements made within the market's designated time frame regardless of when the actual purchases were made.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from MicroStrategy or Michael Saylor.

For reference, MicroStrategy's reported BTC holdings can be tracked at: https://www.strategy.com/purchases

Resolution source: https://www.strategy.com/purchases

evidences.title: MicroStrategy Makes HISTORIC Bitcoin Announcement: Q3 2024 Earnings Call
evidences.content: # MicroStrategy Makes HISTORIC Bitcoin Announcement: Q3 2024 Earnings Call ## Strategy 70300 subscribers 1043 likes ### Description 36274 views Posted: 31 Oct 2024 Chairman Michael Saylor announces MicroStrategy's bold move to invest a historic sum of $42 billion in Bitcoin through equity and debt in Q4, 2024. This massive commitment cements the company's long-term vision and strategic bet on Bitcoin as a core asset. Get the insights behind this high-stakes decision and what it means for the future of finance and crypto! #BitcoinInvestment #CryptoAdoption #BitcoinNews #DigitalAssets #CryptoInvestment #BitcoinStrategy #InvestInBitcoin [...] for today's call. First, uh Phong Le will cover the business and operational results for the third quarter of 2024. Second, Andrew Kang will cover the financial results for the third quarter of 2024. Then, Michael Saylor will provide a strategic review and the vision uh and discuss the recent Bitcoin market updates. And lastly, we'll open up to the Q&A. With that, I will now turn the call over to Phong Le, President and CEO of MicroStrategy. Thank you, Suresh. Hello, everyone. I'd like to welcome all of you to today's webinar. Starting with th...

evidences.title: MicroStrategy Stock and Bitcoin 2025: Dive into Bitcoin's Impact- Trade The Pool - Stock Trading Prop Firm
evidences.content: MicroStrategy will continue its aggressive acquisition strategy for Bitcoin. The company announced a “21/21” strategy to raise $42 billion. This includes at-the-market share sales and fixed-income securities to purchase more Bitcoin. Andrew Kang, the CFO, commented on their treasury strategy. Bitcoin holdings increased by 11% this quarter. They achieved a year-to-date BTC yield of 17.8%. They also cut annualized interest expenses by $24 million. This move shows the company’s commitment to integrating cryptocurrency into its corporate strategy. It may further its financial standing and market influence. For Forex retail traders, understanding MicroStrategy’s expansion goals is crucial. This helps them grasp the interplay between cryptocurrency and global currency. [...] MicroStrategy has made headlines with its bold investment strategy in Bitcoin. Consequently, investors are wondering about MicroStrategy’s stock predictions for 2025. Predictions for MicroStrategy stock in 2025 show high variability. Bitcoin holdings heavily influence them. MarketBeat suggests a price range from $409 to $650. The average is $536.90. Stock Analysis forecasts an average target price of $382.10, with...

evidences.content: # Strategy (MSTR) Q2 2025 Earnings Call | Bitcoin | Michael Saylor, Phong Le & Andrew Kang ## Strategy 70300 subscribers 3934 likes ### Description 86780 views Posted: 31 Jul 2025 LIVE 5-6:30 pm ET on July 31st, 2025 [...] Bitcoin. Uh just a few minutes ago, Coinbase announced that they acquired more Bitcoin this quarter. thousands of Bitcoin. So, I I see very positive trends here. And and each of these companies could in theory um acquire just as much Bitcoin or or attempt to acquire just as much Bitcoin uh in a dollar value as we have acquired. The obviously they won't get 3% of the Bitcoin supply, but you can imagine what happens when a hundred companies are all competing to acquire as much Bitcoin as possible. uh the analysts are all uh starting to cover and track Bitcoin and they have outlooks for Bitcoin. So if you're going to cover the 160 Bitcoin company companies that have Bitcoin on their balance sheet, you're going to have to form an opinion about Bitcoin. And so you can see that the average end [...] way that we all cooperate is we're all competing for the same 450 Bitcoin a day. evidences.title: Earnings call transcript: MicroStrategy’s Q1 2026 earnings miss forecasts, stock rises
evidences.content: 1D 1W 1M 6M 1Y 5Y Max Q1 2026: CJ (Chaitanya Jain), Head of Investor Relations, MicroStrategy: Hello everyone, and good evening. I’m CJ, Head of Investor Relations at Strategy. It’s an honor to kick off Strategy’s first quarter 2026 earnings webinar. I’ll be your moderator today. We will start the call with a 60-minute presentation, starting with Andrew Kang, followed by Phong Le, and then Michael Saylor. This will be followed by a 30-minute interactive Q&A session with 4 Wall Street equity analysts and 4 Bitcoin analysts. Before we proceed, I will read the safe harbor statement. Some of the information we provide in the presentation regarding our future expectations, plans, and prospects may constitute forward-looking statements. Advertisement [...] We’re not gonna sit back and just say, you know, "We’ll never sell the Bitcoin." We wanna be net aggregators of Bitcoin, increasing our total Bitcoin, but more importantly, increasing our Bitcoin per share, because we think that is what is going to be most accretive long term for MSTR and for the common. With that, I will hand it over to Michael Saylor to complete the presentation. Advertisement [...] Michael Saylor, Chief Executive...

evidences.title: MicroStrategy Announces BTC and ATM Activity Raised $2.03 billion; Purchased 27,200 BTC; Now Holds 279,420 BTC with BTC Yield of 26.4% YTD
evidences.content: BTC Update The Company today announced that, during the period between October 31, 2024 and November 10, 2024, the Company acquired approximately 27,200 bitcoins for approximately $2.03 billion in cash, at an average price of approximately $74,463 per bitcoin, inclusive of fees and expenses. The bitcoin purchases were made using proceeds from the issuance and sale of Shares (defined below) under the Sales Agreements (defined below). As of November 10, 2024, the Company, together with its subsidiaries, held an aggregate of approximately 279,420 bitcoins, which were acquired at an aggregate purchase price of approximately $11.9 billion and an average purchase price of approximately $42,692 per bitcoin, inclusive of fees and expenses. evidences.title: EX-99.1
evidences.content: Exhibit 99.1 Strategy Announces Proposed Initial Public Offering of € Denominated STRE Stock TYSONS CORNER, Va.—(BUSINESS WIRE)—November 3, 2025—Strategy Inc (Nasdaq: STRF/STRC/STRK/STRD/MSTR) today announced that, subject to market and other conditions, it intends to conduct an initial public offering registered under the Securities Act of 1933, as amended (the “Securities Act”), of 3,500,000 shares of Strategy’s 10.00% Series A Perpetual Stream Preferred Stock (the “STRE Stock”). Strategy intends to use the net proceeds from the offering for general corporate purposes, including the acquisition of bitcoin and for working capital. evidences.title: EX-99.1
evidences.content: MicroStrategy Incorporated d/b/a Strategy (Nasdaq: MSTR) is the world's first and largest Bitcoin Treasury Company. We are a publicly traded company that has adopted Bitcoin as our primary treasury reserve asset. By using proceeds from equity and debt financings, as well as cash flows from our operations, we strategically accumulate Bitcoin and advocate for its role as digital capital. Our treasury strategy is designed to provide investors varying degrees of economic exposure to Bitcoin by offering a range of securities, including equity and fixed-income instruments. In addition, we provide industry-leading AI-powered enterprise analytics software, advancing our vision of Intelligence Everywhere. We leverage our development capabilities to explore innovation in Bitcoin applications,
evidences.query: site:sec.gov MicroStrategy 8-K bitcoin purchase treasury reserve capital raise November 2025
